description: Covers the one dependency governance/dependabot.yml cannot: the three-cubes-fitness gate engine, pinned by git tag in pyproject.toml (git+https://github.com/three-cubes/tc-fitness.git@vX.Y.Z). Dependabot's uv ecosystem cannot track a git-URL dep; the customManagers regex manager + github-tags datasource below can.

minimumReleaseAge holds the same uniform 3-day cooldown as governance/dependabot.yml (internalChecksFilter=strict makes it a hard hold, not just a pending flag) so an engine tag must age 3 days before a bump PR opens — letting the community surface a compromised release first.

Engine bumps are gate-critical: never automerged, labelled ci-engine, and human-reviewed (they change the definition of the quality gate itself). Copy this file to the repo root as renovate.json; a repo that keeps Dependabot for its registry ecosystems can trim to just the customManagers + packageRules blocks.

customManagers.description: Bump the three-cubes-fitness engine, pinned by git tag in pyproject.toml. Dependabot's uv ecosystem cannot track git-URL deps; this regex manager + github-tags datasource can.

packageRules.description: Engine bumps are gate-critical — never automerge; surface for review.
